programme.desc: James Braxton and Charles Hanson are road tripping south from Glasgow, shopping in Ayrshire and Lanarkshire before selling at an auction in Hamilton. James is bowled over when he sees an arts and crafts oak table while Charles is knocked for six after finding some rare 2,000 year old Roman nails excavated in Scotland. James stops in Ardeer to hear why the local beach is connected to the Nobel Peace Prize and Charles stops off to hear about a local man who became a pioneering social reformer.

programme.title: Long Lost Family

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Born Without Trace
programme.desc: Foundlings are people who were abandoned as babies, often in the first hours and days of their lives. Born without a trace, they have had no way to unlock the secrets of their past. By combining new DNA technology with painstaking detective work, the mysteries of people with unknown beginnings who are desperate for answers can now be solved. Presented by Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell, the team behind `Long Lost Family' use an extraordinary new technique to try and identify birth families and find answers for people who have spent decades trying to find out where they came from.

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm
programme.desc: Nineteenth-century con artists, Jake and Will Grimm, are caught up in a fairy-tale nightmare. They travel from village to village, pretending to protect the people from enchanted creatures and carrying out exorcisms. These skills are put to the test when they come across a genuine magical curse in a haunted forest.

programme.title: Reckless
programme.desc: A former convict on parole must outwit the police to get his share of an old heist.

programme.title: XXX 2: The Next Level
programme.desc: NSA Agent Augustus Gibbons, fresh off the success of his last renegade recruitment, once again finds himself in need of an outsider. Gibbons and his new agent must track a dangerous military splinter group that is conspiring to overthrow the US Government in the nation's capital.

programme.title: Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: Martial arts romp about a TV chef who becomes embroiled in a drug lord's search for an incriminating video. The kung-fu fighting cook steps in to save an investigative journalist on the run from a gang of murderous drug dealers, resulting in a potentially fatal mix-up involving her incriminating tape of the gangsters and a children's video.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but when his experiment goes wrong, he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Competing teams of storm chasers find themselves in a fight for their lives as multiple systems converge over central Oklahoma.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: The evil mummy Imhotep returns to wreak havoc as he resumes his relentless search for power and immortality. To make matters worse, another ancient evil has been unleashed, even more dangerous than Imhotep. Only the heroic Rick O'Connell and his intrepid Egyptologist wife stand in the way of these twin terrors as they embark upon a desperate mission to save the world.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: Tech billionaire Lex Luthor seizes the opportunity to get the Man of Steel out of the way for good. Will intrepid reporter Lois Lane and Superman's four-legged companion, Krypto, be able to help him before it's too late?

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: After he and his wife are murdered, marine Ray Garrison is resurrected by a team of scientists. Enhanced with nanotechnology, he becomes a superhuman, biotech killing machine - Bloodshot. As Ray first trains with fellow super-soldiers, he cannot recall anything from his former life. But when his memories flood back and he remembers the man that killed both him and his wife, he breaks out of the facility to get revenge, only to discover that there's more to the conspiracy than he thought.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team race against time to find the Entity, a rogue artificial intelligence that can destroy mankind.

programme.title: The Bricklayer
programme.desc: A rogue insurgent assassinates foreign journalists and makes it look like the CIA is responsible. Coaxed out of retirement to clear the agency's name, a deadly operative must confront his checkered past while unraveling an international conspiracy.

programme.title: Prisoner of War
programme.desc: Captured by Japanese forces during World War II, a British SAS officer and his fellow prisoners are forced to fight in brutal death matches for the entertainment of their captors.

programme.title: Prisoner of War
programme.desc: Captured by Japanese forces during World War II, a British SAS officer and his fellow prisoners are forced to fight in brutal death matches for the entertainment of their captors.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A man tries to befriend his charismatic new neighbour, but it soon threatens to ruin both of their lives.

programme.title: Coyotes
programme.desc: Members of a family find themselves in a desperate fight for survival when a pack of coyotes swarms their Hollywood Hills home.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones must figure out which of the two men in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he won't let her go that easily.

programme.title: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Electronics store stock boy Andy Stitzer is horrified when he is found out as a virgin by his workmates - just when he thought he was becoming one of the gang. David, Jay and Cal surprise him by making it their mission to get him a girl and help him lose his virginity.

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle
programme.desc: Guided by a rebellious and charismatic coach, British ski jumper Michael "Eddie" Edwards trains for the 1988 Winter Olympics in Calgary, Alberta.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Billy is the son of hotel chain magnate Brian Madison and expects to inherit the family fortune, but he's shocked when his father stipulates he won't unless he passes 12th grade in just 24 weeks. It will be tough, since he never passed 1st grade. Determined to prove his father wrong, Billy enrols at school.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon soon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Electronics store stock boy Andy Stitzer is horrified when he is found out as a virgin by his workmates - just when he thought he was becoming one of the gang. David, Jay and Cal surprise him by making it their mission to get him a girl and help him lose his virginity.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows Spinal Tap as they prepare for a reunion concert. Joined by Paul McCartney and Elton John, they wrestle with their chequered past to put on a show that they hope will solidify their place in rock 'n' roll history.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics' and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: The Natural
programme.desc: The almost mythical ability of a middle-aged baseball player rockets a major-league team toward the 1939 pennant.

programme.desc: The story of Blue, a young man of Jamaican descent living in Brixton in 1980, as he hangs out with his friends, fronts a dub sound system, loses his job, struggles with family problems and has his friendships tested by racism.

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: Whimsical but engaging western about a drifter who saves a woman from a gang of marauders. The cowboy is astonished to learn that the woman is a nun, especially when he witnesses her heavy drinking and cigar-smoking ways. The unlikely pair embark on a voyage of discovery as they become embroiled in the Mexican War.

programme.desc: In the 1990s, an undercover officer is told to entrap and apprehend gay men only to find himself drawn to one of his targets.

programme.title: Chicago

programme.desc: In the 1990s, an undercover officer is told to entrap and apprehend gay men only to find himself drawn to one of his targets.

programme.desc: In the 1990s, an undercover officer is told to entrap and apprehend gay men only to find himself drawn to one of his targets.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Three emojis embark on an epic adventure through a smartphone to save their world from being deleted.

programme.title: Tim Burton's Corpse Bride
programme.desc: Anxious not to make a mistake in his wedding ceremony, Victor goes to the woods to practise his vows. Unfortunately, he slides the ring onto the twig-finger of a long-dead bride who has been waiting years for a suitor.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two fathers get laid off from their well-paid jobs and are forced to stay at home to look after their kids. Seeing the opportunity to make money, the two of them open their own day-care centre. With very little experience and some fairly unconventional ideas on child care, can they really hope to compete against the prim and proper Chapman Academy, which has monopolised the child care industry in their town?

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: Mr. Peabody, the most accomplished canine in the world, and his boy, Sherman, use a time machine called the Wabac to embark on outrageous adventures. However, when Sherman takes the Wabac without permission to impress his friend Penny, he accidentally rips a hole in the universe and causes havoc with world history. It's up to Mr. Peabody to mount a rescue and prevent the past, present and future from being permanently altered. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The plucky penguins join a special inter-species task force in an attempt to stop an evil doctor from taking over the world.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
programme.desc: When Gabby's dollhouse, her most prized possession, ends up in the hands of an eccentric cat lady named Vera, she sets off on an adventure through the real world to get the Gabby Cats back together before it's too late.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: A wildly imaginative seven-year-old boy discovers that his new brother, Boss Baby, is actually a spy on a secret mission, and only he can help thwart a dastardly plot that involves an epic battle between puppies and babies.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear with a passion for all things British travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined - until he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop: the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
programme.desc: When Gabby's dollhouse, her most prized possession, ends up in the hands of an eccentric cat lady named Vera, she sets off on an adventure through the real world to get the Gabby Cats back together before it's too late.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters -- Flopsy, Mopsy and Cotton-Tail -- enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregor's vegetable garden. When one of McGregor's relatives suddenly moves in, he's less than thrilled to discover a family of rabbits in his new home. A battle of wills soon breaks out as the new owner hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a resourceful rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: A high school senior befriends a strange subterranean creature after building a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview

programme.title: Breakdown
programme.desc: Jeff Taylor and his wife Amy are moving to California, and decide to ride across the country. After the car breaks down in the desert, Amy accepts a ride from passing trucker Red to get help. After hours she hasn't returned, and Jeff makes his own way to the nearby diner she was heading for. Nobody there has seen her - not even the trucker who picked her up.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young lawyer joins a small but prestigious law firm only to find out that most of their clients are on the wrong side of the law. The company is helping to launder mob money, get clients off charges and even murder partners who threaten to blow their cover, but when the FBI come calling to gather evidence on the lawyer's colleagues, he is caught between a rock and a hard place, juggling his life and his liberty.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Richard Kemble's wife is murdered and he is arrested for the crime. He soon realises he has been framed, and while being transported on a prison bus, he manages to escape. On the run, he has to evade the relentless pursuit by the US Marshall, Samuel Gerard, while also avoiding everyone he knows, and finding out who the real killer is, the one-armed man who broke into their house.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two wisecracking Miami cops are forced to swap identities in order to track down $100 million of heroin stolen from the police. Their only lead is a young woman who can identify the culprits, but when they track her down, she mistakes one of the cops for his partner, forcing the pair into a bizarre and chaotic life swap.

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket
programme.desc: A US Marine observes the effects the Vietnam War has on his fellow Marines from their brutal basic training to the bloody street fighting in Hue, Vietnam.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: While visiting London with his family, Jack Ryan foils an IRA attempt to assassinate a government minister, killing one of the attackers in the process. Swearing vengeance, the IRA's Sean Miller follows Ryan and his family to their seaside home in America where he and his followers plan to exact their revenge.

programme.title: The Fugitive

programme.title: The Mummy

An American mercenary who knows of the secret location is rescued from a Cairo prison by an English historian and her brother, and together they set off on a hunt. Along the way, the trio encounter flesh-eating scarab beetles, killer sandstorms, and reincarnated demons.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: In an attempt to avenge the violent death of his parents, Bruce Wayne fights to rid the city of crime and in particular, his nemesis the Joker. However, his defences come down when an attractive journalist tries to track down the truth behind sightings of a huge bat-like figure in the sky.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: After Selina Kyle sees more than she should in her boss's office, she has an `accident', falling from the top floor of the building to the street below. Awoken by the licking of cats, she is surprised to find herself still very much alive. She vows to take revenge on her boss and becomes a female avenger, defending women under attack and providing assistance to Batman's efforts to keep the streets of Gotham safe.

programme.title: The Krays
programme.desc: The disturbing story of the making of the infamous 60s underworld figures Reggie and Ronnie Kray - from their upbringing by a domineering mother in the deprivation of London's East End. The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.desc: Lewa Conservancy is working to return elephants to territory from Mt Kenya to Samburu National Park. They have also created an elephant exclusion zone to try to restore a damaged ecosystem.

programme.title: Great Parks of Africa
programme.desc: In the centre of South Africa is an ancient landscape that was once an inland sea. Now it is a mosaic of unique habitats. Life here has evolved ingenious solutions to survive. There is nowhere in South Africa quite like the Karoo National Park.

programme.desc: A look at the lives of monkeys, chimps, orangutans, and apes living at the world's biggest sanctuary, the 65-acre Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre in Wareham, Dorset.

programme.desc: Elephant hunting has been banned in Kenya for 40 years. Organized gangs of armed poachers are still targeting elephants, illegally hunting them and selling their ivory tusks on the black market.

programme.desc: In the southern reaches of Africa's great Kalahari basin, everything is made tough. Ancient rivers harbour water deep underground, and these hidden lifelines forge a fragile link to survival. This is the Kgalagadi Transfrontier Park.

programme.title: Uptown Otters
programme.desc: Trouble brews in Marina Bay when the Nomads and Townies squat on Bay family territory whilst the family are away upriver. When the Bay family make a surprise early return, conflict looms.

programme.title: Kenya Wildlife Diaries
programme.desc: Grévy's zebras population has dropped by 50 in less than 20 years. Environmentalists say that if we aren't vigilant, they could disappear all together.

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.desc: Follows Southern muriqui Dora after she takes her first steps away from her mom Mimi. Later, explores spider monkey troop dynamics and tail-hanging technique.

programme.title: Coastal Africa
programme.desc: This is the story of the Golden Forest, the vast expanses of kelp that lines Africa's southwestern shore. Fed by an upwelling of nutrients from deep in the Atlantic, the kelp forest nurtures four distinct worlds.

programme.title: Wild Sky
programme.desc: The skies above our planet never stop moving. Wind, rain, drought and blizzards shape the lives of every living thing. As weather sweeps across four continents, creatures find ingenious solutions to survive our planet's wild sky.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: In the beachside suburbs of the Sunshine Coast, it's not just snakes that have residents on alert. While Dan tries to rescue the larger lizard from the roof, Jess chases another that has escaped up a high tree, next to an active beehive! Stu visits a farm with an eastern brown snake trapped in a fence and Liv and Stu protect a dog from a roaming red belly black snake. Meanwhile, Mick plays a prickly game of hide and seek with a stubborn coastal carpet python.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Follows a group of professional snake catchers on Queensland's Sunshine Coast as they go head-to-head with some of the planet's deadliest snakes.

programme.title: Over Australia
programme.desc: From the dry plains of the interior come the most recognizable images of Australia, the monolithic red rock of Uluru, the languid, bounding Red Kangaroo. The Arid Heart of Australia is vast and iconic.

programme.title: Give Us A Clue

programme.title: Month of Sundays

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike and Molly are doing everything they can to improve their chances of conceiving, but healthy living ain't easy! Carl has problems with grandma.

programme.title: Mike & Molly

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Poor old Marie - her small garden with its high walls and boring lawn is so imposing, it's more of a prison yard than a pretty plot. In fact she'd rather have a traditional cottage garden than what she has. But the Garden Rescue team are undaunted, and Chris and Lee want to release her from her brick nightmare! After Marie chooses Chris's design. it's on with turning the new build plot into a bit of country charm.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh presents the garden makeover show, transforming unloved spaces for some very special people. Alan and the team are in the sleepy town of Wiveliscombe to surprise a pair of real-life Golden Girls - Roberta and Enid, who have been friends for 71 years. Robbie is 91 and Enid 86. programme.desc: When an art historian is found murdered in his home, DI Mick Palmer and DC Shazia Malik are sent to investigate. As they dig into the case, they uncover a vandalised painting, sabotaged security footage, and a dark family secret.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The UCOS team's feathers are ruffled when Steve McAndrew, a retired detective from Glasgow, descends on the office like a bundle of Scottish energy. Brought in to reinvestigate one of his original cases - the disappearance of teenager Georgia Wright - McAndrew's policing methods raise a few eyebrows. He has a few tricks up his sleeve that make Brian and Gerry look like slaves to the rule book.

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: Bodies pile up all over Yorkshire but Dalziel and Pascoe are always led back to the Wetherton Arts Centre, which is putting on a production of Oliver. Things become very personal for Dalziel and Pascoe when one of their own goes missing.

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Emerging from prison after being convicted of dealing in stolen goods, Lovejoy is anxious to discover who framed him and enlists the help of Lady Jane Felsham.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: While a visiting theatrical troupe puts on a nativity play at St. Judas, a precious holy relic goes missing, and the actor playing Jesus is killed.Contains Mature Themes.

programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Monsieur Spade
programme.desc: Spade searches for answers regarding the mysterious young boy that everyone seems to be looking for; Samir takes him into hiding, but no one knows what to make of his incessant writing; Spade gets a call from the elusive Philippe.

programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Classic Doctors
programme.desc: Ronnie becomes embroiled in the quarrels of a jealous couple. Jimmi tries to come to terms with his loss, but a mysterious phone call provides him with brief hope.

programme.title: Classic Doctors
programme.desc: Vivien discovers an abandoned baby on her doorstep, and calls Jimmi when she finds that the child has a high temperature.

programme.title: Classic Holby City
programme.desc: Dominic's son confronts Zubin, swearing to make him pay for his father's death, and Chrissie tries to seduce Owen at a charity ball. Jocelyn Jee Esien guest stars.

programme.title: Classic Casualty
programme.desc: The long-running medical drama continues. Linda is faced with a moral dilemma: will she help a drug-addicted prostitute in a war against her abusive pimp or walk away?

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Rickman's trust in Leroy is pushed to the limit as local gang warfare erupts.

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Jane protects her family, only to find they are the ones who betrayed her. Meanwhile, Heather gets a scare but Minty is there to help.

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: While Jane stands by her life-changing decision, Stacey feels she's being pushed out by Max, and Tam refuses to pretend his brother doesn't exist.

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.sub-title: Too Many Harrys Spoil the Murder
programme.desc: When a renowned chef's girlfriend is brutally murdered, Harry and Fergus have to contend with a rival private detective, a gangster's henchman, and an utterly baffling mystery. Meanwhile, Paula makes a life-changing announcement.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: A famous actress come to the Colonists Club and stuns everyone by dropping dead onstage. Convinced the killer is still in the room, Chief Superintendent Munro locks all the doors and gives Blake just one night to solve the murder.

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Whilst still investigating his friend's death, Lovejoy discovers other suspicious goings-on in an art scam in Venice.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey manages a boys' football team, while Dorien finds a psychic who will change her life.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The First Human Being to Ride a Hill
programme.desc: When Pearl confiscates Howard's bicycle, Foggy suggests that what he needs is one which can be easily concealed, or better still, doesn't look like a bike.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Lieutenant Commander Willoughby (retired) takes an instant liking to Compo, Clegg and Foggy, and offers them the opportunity to become immensely wealthy.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Rejected yet again by Nora Batty, Compo decides to look up his old girlfriends from his schooldays. Are the days of wrinkly stockings on their way out?

programme.title: This Is Not a Murder Mystery
programme.desc: As Lord James's VIP guests arrive for the exhibition, the tension is palpable: there's a new missing person. Even as Picasso, Guggenheim, and Freud arrive, Magritte and Quant try to keep their cool.

programme.title: The Chelsea Detective
programme.desc: London's Chelsea neighbourhood is a beautiful borough for beautiful people, but it has a dark underside of deception, violence, greed-and murder. Bodies have a way of showing up, and things are rarely what they seem.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: When UCOS reinvestigate the suspected suicide of a young diplomat, DS Sandra Pullman breaks the rules in order to explore a possible cover-up at the Foreign Office.

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: It's a rainy night in the Yorkshire village of Strenton and a mysterious stranger arrives. Daggers are drawn in the village with the arrival of a new bypass, but the new road leads to murder when a mutilated body is found by an archaeological team who are in search of an ancient burial site.

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Whilst still investigating his friend's death, Lovejoy discovers other suspicious goings-on in an art scam in Venice.

programme.title: This Is Not a Murder Mystery
programme.desc: New guests arrive at West Dean, bringing tension and poor manners. As Quant and Thistlethwaite race to connect the dots, a masked figure with a face of roses emerges.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve leads an expedition in the Jebel Akhdar mountain range of Oman. With temperatures soaring, dehydration and heat stroke are a constant threat.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve heads to the Himalayas to visit the last great unexplored river in Bhutan. Legend has it that, at some point, the river drops off the face of the planet.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and a team of rock climbers head to the desert of southern Oman to attempt the first ascent of a towering escarpment, hoping to find the elusive Arabian leopard.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Three MGs from the 70s turn up at the garage, still covered in original factory wax. Nobody can believe it, or value them. A Morris 1000 turns up at the auction along with a TR7 V8.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Three rare Alvises get the auction buyers going when put under the hammer. A Chevy Corvette which started its journey in Saudi Arabia makes its way to Thornton le Dale for the sale.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave gets a nasty surprise when he opens the bonnet of a fast Ford from the 80's, and an Austin Heavy 12 nearly a century old sets off a bidding war at the auction.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek, with help from the Mathewson clan, drag a mini pickup out of the barn where it's been for 20 years, and a 350cc Douglas Mark V motorbike from 1950 goes under the hammer.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Four VW camper vans pitch up at the auction house looking for a new home and Derek picks up an Austin 16 that goes like stink and has some unusual modern modifications.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Series following a group of trawler fishermen in Peterhead, Scotland. Prawn boat Amity is in the grip of a winter storm, 100 miles from shore, with its nets caught on the seabed. Skipper Jimmy Buchan and his crew battle to save the boat and themselves. Elsewhere, a rival prawn trawler is filling its nets. Skippered by the young and ambitious James West, Fruitful Bough is one of the most successful boats in Peterhead.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Jimmy Buchan, skipper of the prawn trawler Amity, has just hours to decide whether to run through a storm to Peterhead or try and ride it out. Fruitful Bough, another prawn boat, is also wondering what to do - face the mountainous seas and gale force winds or lose vital fishing time by taking shelter in the Shetland Islands? Away from the storm, the whitefish boat Ocean Venture isn't catching any valuable haddock.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Ocean Venture has headed north and is fishing at `The Edge', only 150 miles south of the Arctic Circle. Having failed to catch enough fish, skipper John Buchan is taking a huge risk in the deep and treacherous waters of the North Atlantic in a bid to find the perfect catch. With the previous night's storm over, Amity gets back to the business of trying to catch prawns.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Offshore fishing, the most dangerous job in Britain, has a problem when it comes to getting new recruits, but 17-year-old Ryan wants to take up the challenge. He sets out on his first trip on one of the most successful pair of trawlers in Britain as they head into the rough Norwegian waters looking for cod and haddock. If he doesn't impress skipper Kevin West, he'll be looking for a new job when they come back.

programme.desc: Churchill described Italy as the `soft underbelly of the crocodile', thinking the Allies could cut through it to reach Germany. However, it turns out to be tougher than he imagined.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: As Allied troops prepare to defend Burma - the shield and barrier protecting India - they are confronted in dreadful monsoon conditions by the Japanese, who are well-prepared for jungle warfare. Thus begins the longest retreat in British military history.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Life on the British Home Front is a time of gas masks, digging for victory, evacuation and the Squander Bug. The Luftwaffe redirect their bombing raids to provincial cities and U-boat operations in the Atlantic mean that food supplies are scarce.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Germany's initial triumphs lose momentum as the tide of the war turns in favour of the Allies. Internal opposition to the Reich culminates in an assassination plot.

programme.desc: A bull terrier puppy needs a 3D printed implant for a new lease of life. Meanwhile, a Siamese cat has multiple injuries after being hit by a van and a beloved collie cross needs a new hip.

programme.title: How To Catch A Serial Killer
programme.desc: Spanning more than a decade, multiple murders, two much-publicised trials and one irreparably damaged career, it is a story of the dogged pursuit of a serial-killer.The pursuit of Christopher Halliwell by Detective Steve Fulcher has been one of the biggest crime stories in recent years, captivating the public's attention.

programme.title: Wagspiracy: Vardy v Rooney
programme.desc: In 2019, 'Wagatha Christie' gripped Britain as Coleen Rooney accused Rebekah Vardy of leaking stories about her to the tabloid press. Despite huge media attention on this social media scandal, and a trial that ended up in the high-court in the summer of 2022, with Rooney emerging victorious, the inside story of how and why this extraordinary moment in British culture came to pass, has never fully been told - until now.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez Uncovered
programme.desc: The untold true story of NFL superstar Aaron Hernandez from the viewpoint of those who knew him best strips away the layers to answer the many questions left behind after Hernandez's tragic death.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...
programme.desc: Louis spends time with Canadian comedian, actor and writer Katherine Ryan. Since her arrival in the UK 15 years ago, Katherine has become one of the country's most outspoken performers.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: West Midlands paramedics assess a man that the police have found acting erratically on a busy dual carriageway, the police believe he has taken the powerful psychoactive, 'Monkey Dust'.

programme.desc: Following a break in Cyprus, HMS Queen Elizabeth heads back to sea. But within days, a stowaway is discovered: Covid. Before long, hundreds are in isolation, and tensions rise across the warship.

programme.title: The Warship: Tour of Duty
programme.desc: The story of HMS Queen Elizabeth's first operational mission: a seven-month voyage to the other side of an increasingly troubled world.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Interviews with Mountbatten himself, with Eisenhower's driver and with troops involved in the D-Day landings bring those gory and glorious days to life.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: As peace descends in 1945, the series ends with a sombre reminder of the human cost of the bloodiest conflict in history.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts head to the Scottish borders for another busy day of valuations at Abbotsford, near Melrose, once the home of Sir Walter Scott. Objects under scrutiny include a bottle used by smugglers to fool the customs men, a miniature battle scene exquisitely hand cut by a prisoner during World War One, and a dinner service fit for a queen.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team set sail for the Channel Islands, where the people of Guernsey give them a warm welcome at Saumarez Park. Objects intriguing the experts include a piece of furniture used as target practice by the Germans during the occupation of the island, a giant sapphire once owned by a Maharajah, and a single bank note which turns out to be worth a fortune.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek makes his way to Blackpool to pick up what will be the highest priced item at the next auction. But, the 1970 Aston Martin DBS needs a tow to the local garage.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Over the years Derek has learnt to always expect the unexpected. So when Call the Midwife star, Cliff Parisi, drops off his Bedford CA campervan it's just another day at the office.

programme.desc: Interviews with Mountbatten himself, with Eisenhower's driver and with troops involved in the D-Day landings bring those gory and glorious days to life.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Jump on board with narrowboater Robbie Cumming as he explores the Victorian village of Saltaire on the Leeds and Liverpool Canal, moors up in Leeds and goes in search of an abandoned waterway on the Aire and Calder Navigation.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: The real side of boating with Robbie Cumming. On the last leg of his epic journey across the North of England, Robbie tackles the fast-flowing River Ouse and is forced to make an emergency stop. His destination is Ripon Basin at the outer reaches of our inland waterways.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: In Shropshire, a Great Western Railway 'Modified Hall' steam engine and its tender is being taken out of service as it needs a safety inspection.

programme.title: Trawlermen: Hunting the Catch
programme.desc: Three hundred thousand square miles of ocean. Three GPS-tracked voyages, filmed around the clock. One week at sea. Storm Arwen hits the UK, with the potential to affect the country's entire fishing fleet. In the North Sea, pair trawlers Victory Rose and Our Lass must come together each time they haul, making them vulnerable to collision in bad weather.

Objects under scrutiny include a bottle used by smugglers to fool the customs men, a miniature battle scene exquisitely hand cut by a prisoner during World War One, and a dinner service fit for a queen.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Jump on board with narrowboater Robbie Cumming as he explores the Victorian village of Saltaire on the Leeds and Liverpool Canal, moors up in Leeds and goes in search of an abandoned waterway on the Aire and Calder Navigation.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: The real side of boating with Robbie Cumming. On the last leg of his epic journey across the North of England, Robbie tackles the fast-flowing River Ouse and is forced to make an emergency stop. His destination is Ripon Basin at the outer reaches of our inland waterways.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: In Shropshire, a Great Western Railway 'Modified Hall' steam engine and its tender is being taken out of service as it needs a safety inspection.

programme.title: Trawlermen: Hunting the Catch
programme.desc: Three hundred thousand square miles of ocean. Three GPS-tracked voyages, filmed around the clock. One week at sea. Storm Arwen hits the UK, with the potential to affect the country's entire fishing fleet. In the North Sea, pair trawlers Victory Rose and Our Lass must come together each time they haul, making them vulnerable to collision in bad weather.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek makes his way to Blackpool to pick up what will be the highest priced item at the next auction. But, the 1970 Aston Martin DBS needs a tow to the local garage.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Over the years Derek has learnt to always expect the unexpected. So when Call the Midwife star, Cliff Parisi, drops off his Bedford CA campervan it's just another day at the office.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Four VW camper vans pitch up at the auction house looking for a new home and Derek picks up an Austin 16 that goes like stink and has some unusual modern modifications.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry finds a treat for restorer Guy, and Simon creates stunning table lamps from old theatre lights.

programme.title: Agatha Christie Mystery Queen
programme.desc: Historian Lucy Worsley investigates the complex factors that shaped the dark imagination of a refined Devonshire lady, discovering family secrets and a childhood haunted by a sinister figure.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: The Warship: Tour of Duty
programme.desc: After travelling over 20,000 miles, HMS Queen Elizabeth heads from Japan back to Guam for vital maintenance. The ship and her escorts sail in convoy with the American, Japanese and Australian navies for a show of strength in China's backyard.

programme.title: The Warship: Tour of Duty
programme.desc: After six months at sea on her first operational deployment, HMS Queen Elizabeth departs the Pacific for the long voyage home.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A 1971 Mercedes SL and a 1989 Jaguar XJS emerge from a barn on a chicken farm, a Roller and a Rover go under the hammer and a 1966 Triumph Spitfire is restored to near perfection.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek takes a shine to a rare 1958 Armstrong Siddeley Sapphire with a long family history and a convertible Triumph Herald brings a few smiles on auction day.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A mile-and-a half of recently-excavated trenches, bunkers, barracks, and gun encasements near Pointe du Hoc, which tell a new story of D-Day.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce is in Normandy for a special edition of the roadshow to commemorate the 80th anniversary of the D-Day landings in June 1944. Filmed in Normandy and at the D-Day Museum in Portsmouth, the team hear eyewitness accounts from the time.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team arrive at Brooklands Motor Racing and Aviation Museum, near Weybridge in Surrey. Thousands flock to the paddocks, where the experts are on duty. Amongst the objects exciting their interest are a risque bust found abandoned in a garden, rare artefacts recording the Bluebird attempts to break world speed records, an old chest given away on the internet and valuable aboriginal tools.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts return to the Brooklands Motor Racing and Aviation Museum near Weybridge for another busy day of valuations. Objects brought before the cameras include a rare and highly valuable stirrup cup, books once owned by Churchill and rescued from a garden fire, and a remarkable bracelet given to Queen Victoria that was found in a gutter. Plus Fiona welcomes the return of a friendly Roadshow face.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up an impressive five vehicle haul from a collector who can no longer look after his motors. Paul's out on the road too - he's collecting a rare 1972 Lancia Fulvia Berlina.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave picks up a 1970s Alfa Romeo that once starred in a chocolate advert. Meanwhile, Derek casts his eye over a Citroen 2CV before becoming distracted by a treasure trove of more than 270 motorbikes in the same garage.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming begins his 300-mile boating adventure across the north of England and the Midlands. He is forced to make a running repair to his narrowboat, the Naughty Lass, while on the Tinsley lock flight in South Yorkshire, he cruises beneath Conisbrough's magnificent viaduct and must wait for an unusual sliding railway bridge to open on the Stainforth and Keadby Canal.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming tackles the fast-flowing tidal River Trent and is invited to join a night-time illuminated boat parade. However, his journey is hampered by a damaged wall in Worksop and a water shortage on the picturesque Chesterfield Canal.
